products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 18V Brushless 7-1/4" Circular Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Milwaukee's flagship cordless circular saw uses their POWERSTATE brushless motor to deliver 6,000 RPM, matching the cutting speed of a 15-amp corded saw. It can cut through 3x material in a single pass with its 2-5/8" depth of cut, and runs up to 750 cuts per charge with a FORGE 12.0Ah battery.
features: POWERSTATE brushless motor delivers 6,000 RPM for corded-level cutting performance
2-5/8" cut depth handles 3x lumber in a single pass
Positive depth detents at 1/2", 3/4", and 1-1/2" for common material thicknesses
Compatible with all M18 REDLITHIUM batteries including FORGE high-output packs
Electric brake stops blade quickly after each cut

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR 7-1/4" Brushless Circular Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: DeWalt's workhorse cordless circular saw features a brushless motor that delivers 5,200 RPM and maintains speed under load for smooth, consistent cuts. At around $199 bare tool, it hits a sweet spot between performance and value for serious DIYers who are already in the DeWalt 20V MAX ecosystem.
features: Brushless motor provides 5,200 RPM and maintains speed under load
57-degree bevel capacity with detents at common angles
Electric brake stops the blade after releasing the trigger
Lightweight at 7.3 lbs for reduced fatigue on long cuts
Compatible with all DeWalt 20V MAX and FLEXVOLT batteries

products.name: Makita 18V X2 LXT (36V) Brushless 7-1/4" Circular Saw (Tool Only)

specs.voltage_note: Uses two 18V LXT batteries for 36V total

products.description: Makita's dual-battery circular saw uses two 18V LXT batteries together for 36V of power, matching or exceeding corded performance. The Automatic Speed Change technology adjusts cutting speed and torque during cuts for optimum performance. It delivers up to 610 crosscuts in 2x4 lumber per charge.
features: Dual-battery 36V system delivers 6,000 RPM for corded cutting power
Automatic Speed Change technology adjusts torque and RPM to the application
Die-cast magnesium base, blade guard, and blade cover for durability
BL brushless motor provides 50% longer run time per charge vs brushed
Up to 610 crosscuts per charge in 2x4 SPF lumber with two 5.0Ah batteries

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Brushless 7-1/4" Circular Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Ryobi's most powerful cordless circular saw delivers 3x faster cutting than previous models and up to 370 cuts per charge. At $129 bare tool, it is the most affordable brushless 7-1/4" cordless circ saw on the market, making it the go-to budget pick for homeowners already using Ryobi ONE+ batteries.
features: Brushless motor delivers 4,300 RPM with 3X faster cutting than previous Ryobi models
Tool-free bevel and depth adjustments for quick setup changes
56-degree max bevel with clear markings at common angles
Up to 370 cuts per charge for extended runtime
Compatible with all Ryobi ONE+ 18V batteries (over 300+ tools in the system)

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL SAWZALL Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: The Milwaukee M18 FUEL SAWZALL is the fastest-cutting cordless reciprocating saw in its class, delivering 3,000 strokes per minute with a 1-1/4" stroke length for aggressive demolition and cutting. It is lighter and more compact than the previous generation, making it easier to maneuver in tight spaces.
features: POWERSTATE brushless motor delivers 3,000 SPM for fastest cutting in class
1-1/4" stroke length for aggressive material removal
REDLINK PLUS electronics protect against overload, overheat, and over-discharge
Adjustable shoe, integrated LED light, and hanging hook
Lighter and more compact than previous gen for better access in tight spaces

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR Brushless Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: DeWalt's brushless recip saw delivers up to 3,200 strokes per minute in a lightweight 5.1 lb package, making it highly maneuverable for everything from light construction to demolition. The 2-finger variable speed trigger gives you precise speed control for different materials.
features: Brushless motor delivers 0-3,200 SPM for fast, efficient cutting
Lightweight at 5.1 lbs with compact design for tight spaces
Pivoting shoe for stabilization against the workpiece
Keyless twist-style blade clamp for quick blade changes without tools
Bright LED light for visibility in dark work areas

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Makita's brushless recip saw stands out for its consistently high cutting speeds and variable two-speed design. The low speed (2,300 SPM) is great for controlled cuts in metal, while the high speed (3,000 SPM) tears through wood. Multiple professional reviews rank it as having the best overall cutting performance in its class.
features: Variable 2-speed brushless motor: Low 0-2,300 SPM and High 0-3,000 SPM
1-1/4" stroke length for aggressive material removal
Tool-less blade change system for quick swaps on the job
LED light, retractable tool hook, and rubberized soft-grip handle
Star Protection computer controls prevent overloading and overheating

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Brushless Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Ryobi's brushless recip saw delivers 64% faster cutting than the previous model and hits 3,200 SPM, which is competitive with much pricier pro brands. At under $100 bare tool, it is an excellent value for homeowners who need a reciprocating saw for occasional demolition, pruning, or remodeling work.
features: Brushless motor provides 3,200 SPM and 64% faster cutting vs previous model
1-1/4" stroke length matches pro-level tools
Over 380 cuts per charge for extended runtime
Compatible with all Ryobi ONE+ 18V batteries (300+ tool system)
Includes 6-inch wood blade to get started right away

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL D-Handle Jig Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Milwaukee's D-handle jig saw pushes 3,500 strokes per minute, which is faster than most corded jigsaws. The variable-speed trigger and 4 orbital action settings give you precise control for everything from delicate scrollwork to fast rough cuts. Great for cutting curves, making plunge cuts, and detail work.
features: POWERSTATE brushless motor delivers 3,500 SPM, faster than corded competitors
4-position orbital action for material-specific cutting performance
Toolless blade change and toolless bevel adjustment up to 45 degrees
Integrated LED light with on/off dust blower for cut-line visibility
Cuts up to 105 linear feet of 3/4" laminated particle board per charge

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR Brushless Top-Handle Jig Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: DeWalt's brushless jig saw is praised for its low vibration, excellent ergonomics, and precise cutting control. The keyless blade change and keyless bevel adjustment make on-the-fly changes fast and easy. At $179, it offers pro-level accuracy and comfort at a mid-range price.
features: Brushless motor delivers up to 3,200 SPM with variable speed trigger and dial
4-position orbital action for material-specific performance
All-metal keyless lever-action blade change for quick T-shank swaps
Keyless bevel change with detents at 0, 15, 30, and 45 degrees
Removable no-mar shoe cover prevents scratching finished surfaces

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless Jig Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Makita's brushless jig saw features a variable speed control dial (800-3,500 SPM) that lets you precisely match the speed to the material. It bevels up to 45 degrees both left and right, which is a feature some competitors lack. The brushless motor gives you up to 50% longer run time per charge.
features: Variable speed control dial: 800-3,500 SPM for precise material matching
3 orbital settings plus straight cutting for versatile performance
45-degree bevel capacity both left and right
Tool-less blade change system and integrated dust blower
Brushless motor delivers 50% longer run time vs brushed equivalent

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Brushless Jig Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Ryobi's brushless jig saw delivers 36% faster cutting and 78% longer runtime than the previous model, with variable speed up to 3,400 SPM. The 4 orbital settings handle wood, plastic, and metal. At $129, it is the most affordable brushless jig saw from a major brand.
features: Brushless motor delivers up to 3,400 SPM with 36% faster cutting
4 orbital settings for increased cutting versatility across materials
Variable speed dial (800-3,400 SPM) for precise control
45-degree bevel capacity both left and right
Includes T-shank wood cutting blade and non-marring shoe

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL Oscillating Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
products.description: Milwaukee's oscillating multi-tool dominates cutting speed tests, delivering the fastest cuts of any cordless model on the market thanks to its aggressive 4.2-degree oscillation angle and 20,000 OPM max speed. The vibration dampening technology keeps it comfortable despite all that power. Use it for flush cuts, plunge cuts, sanding, and scraping.
features: POWERSTATE brushless motor: 10,000-20,000 OPM with 4.2-degree oscillation angle
Fastest cutting cordless oscillating multi-tool on the market
10-setting speed dial with auto-load ramp-up feature
Vibration dampening technology for lowest vibration in class
180-degree integrated LED light for visibility in dark areas

products.name: DeWalt ATOMIC 20V MAX Brushless Oscillating Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
products.description: DeWalt's ATOMIC oscillating multi-tool is compact at just 11.2 inches long, making it great for getting into tight spots. The brushless motor provides up to 57% more runtime than a similar brushed tool. At $99 bare tool, it is one of the best values in cordless multi-tools.
features: Compact 11.2-inch length for work in tight areas
Brushless motor provides 57% more runtime than brushed equivalent
Dual-grip variable speed trigger for precise speed and application control
Quick-change accessory system compatible with most oscillating tool accessories
Bright LED light for dark work areas

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Cordless Oscillating Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
products.description: Makita's oscillating multi-tool features a wide speed range (6,000-20,000 OPM) via a variable speed dial that lets you fine-tune for different materials. The small 2-3/8" barrel grip reduces hand fatigue during extended use. Note: this model uses a brushed motor, not brushless, but still delivers solid performance for cutting, sanding, scraping, and grout removal.
features: Variable speed control dial: 6,000-20,000 OPM for precise material matching
3.2-degree oscillation angle for aggressive cutting and sanding
Small 2-3/8" diameter barrel grip for comfort and reduced fatigue
Soft start feature for smooth, controlled starts
Accepts adapters to fit most competitive brand accessories

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Brushless Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
products.description: Ryobi's brushless oscillating multi-tool delivers up to 20,000 OPM with a 3.6-degree oscillation angle that provides 30% faster cutting than the previous model. At just 2.25 lbs, it is one of the lightest cordless multi-tools available, and the slide-on power switch means you do not have to hold a trigger during long tasks.
features: Brushless motor delivers 20,000 OPM with 3.6-degree oscillation angle
30% faster cutting than previous Ryobi model
Ultra-light at 2.25 lbs for minimal fatigue
Slide-on power switch eliminates need to hold trigger continuously
Tool-free accessory release for quick blade and pad changes

products.name: DeWalt 15 Amp 12" Double Bevel Sliding Compound Miter Saw
products.description: The DWS779 is widely considered the best-value 12" sliding miter saw you can buy. The powerful 15-amp motor spins at 3,800 RPM and cuts through hardwood like butter. It handles 2x14 lumber at 90 degrees and up to 7-1/2" nested crown molding. This is the saw most DIYers and even many pros reach for when they need a full-size miter saw without the premium price of the DWS780.
features: 15-amp motor at 3,800 RPM powers through hardwood effortlessly
Double bevel: 49 degrees both left and right, no need to flip the workpiece
Cuts 2x14 at 90 degrees and 7-1/2" nested crown molding
Adjustable stainless steel miter detent plate with 10 positive stops
Dust collection system captures over 75% of dust generated

products.name: DeWalt 15 Amp 12" Double Bevel Sliding Compound Miter Saw with XPS
products.description: The DWS780 is the premium version of the DWS779, adding DeWalt's XPS cross-cut positioning system that projects an LED shadow on your cut line -- no calibration needed, ever. It also cuts wider material (2x16 at 90 degrees vs 2x14). If you are doing trim work, crown molding, or any project where precision matters, the XPS system alone is worth the upgrade.
features: XPS cross-cut positioning system projects adjustment-free cut line indication
15-amp motor at 3,800 RPM for professional-grade cutting power
Cuts 2x16 at 90 degrees, wider capacity than the DWS779
Tall sliding fences support 7-1/2" nested crown and 6-3/4" base molding
Compact 56 lb design for easier transport between job locations

products.name: Metabo HPT 10" Compound Miter Saw (15 Amp)
products.description: The Metabo HPT C10FCGS is the go-to budget miter saw and consistently one of the best sellers in its category. At just 24.2 lbs, it is the lightest 10" compound miter saw in its class, making it easy to carry around. It is a no-frills saw: no laser, no LED guide, just solid cuts at an unbeatable price. Perfect for a beginner's first miter saw.
features: Lightest 10" miter saw in class at just 24.2 lbs for easy portability
15-amp motor generates 5,000 RPM for fast crosscuts and miters
52-degree miter range both left and right
Extended flip fence rises to 4" for accurate cutting of large workpieces
Includes 10" 24T TCT blade, dust bag, and material clamp

products.name: DeWalt 15 Amp 10" Jobsite Table Saw with 32-1/2" Rip Capacity and Rolling Stand
products.description: The DWE7491RS is the most popular portable jobsite table saw in America, and for good reason. The 32-1/2" rip capacity means you can rip full sheets of plywood, the rack-and-pinion fence system is smooth and accurate, and the included rolling stand makes setup and breakdown a breeze. The 15-amp motor handles hardwoods without bogging down.
features: 32-1/2" rip capacity handles full sheets of plywood and large material
Rack and pinion fence system provides smooth, accurate, locked-in adjustments
Rolling stand included for easy setup, breakdown, and transport
15-amp motor at 4,800 RPM rips through hardwoods with ease
Telescoping fence retracts for transport and flips over for narrow rip cuts

products.name: DeWalt 15 Amp 8-1/4" Compact Jobsite Table Saw
products.description: The DWE7485 trades the full-size 10" blade for an 8-1/4" blade, which lets DeWalt shrink the entire saw down to 46 lbs. That is half the weight of the DWE7491RS. You give up some rip capacity (24.5" vs 32.5") and cutting depth, but gain massive portability. Perfect for DIYers who need a table saw they can actually move by themselves.
features: Compact and portable at just 46 lbs, roughly half the weight of a 10" jobsite saw
24-1/2" rip capacity handles most common ripping tasks
15-amp, 5,800 RPM motor for fast, clean cuts
Rack and pinion telescoping fence rails for smooth, accurate adjustments
Power-loss reset prevents accidental restarts after power disruption
